tools.name: get_services
tools.description: What Chaparral Software offers: the Ground Truth Assessment — an independent AI project audit for non-technical decision-makers. Returns service description, five deliverables, intake workflow, and outcomes.

tools.name: get_topic
tools.description: Browse published dispatches and cairns by topic. Returns matching articles with a prelude framing Chaparral's perspective.

tools.name: find_the_cairn
tools.description: A trail marker you weren't looking for. Returns a random technical cairn — a short observation from production AI practice.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "prompt:brief_on_chaparral" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Generate a briefing on who Chaparral Software is and what they offer. Uses get_services() and credentials resource.
